Package org.drip.historical.engine

Class TreasuryBondExplainProcessor

java.lang.Object
org.drip.historical.engine.HorizonChangeExplainProcessor
org.drip.historical.engine.TreasuryBondExplainProcessor
public class TreasuryBondExplainProcessor
extends HorizonChangeExplainProcessor
TreasuryBondExplainProcessor contains the Functionality associated with the Horizon Analysis of the Treasury Bond. It provides the following Functionality:
  • TreasuryBondExplainProcessor Constructor
  • Generate the Map of the Roll Down Market Quote Metrics
  • Generate and Snap Relevant Fields from the T1 Market Valuation Parameters
  • Update the Fixings (if any) to the Second Market Parameters
  • Generate and Snap Relevant Fields from the T2 Market Valuation Parameters
  • Generate the Horizon Differential Metrics Map

Module Computational Core Module
Library Computation Support
Project Historical State Processing Utilities
Package Product Horizon Change Explain Engine

Author:
Lakshmi Krishnamurthy

  • Constructor Details

    • TreasuryBondExplainProcessor

      public TreasuryBondExplainProcessor​(TreasuryComponent treasuryComponent, java.lang.String marketMeasure, double marketMeasureValue, JulianDate t1, JulianDate t2, CurveSurfaceQuoteContainer t1CurveSurfaceQuoteContainer, CurveSurfaceQuoteContainer t2CurveSurfaceQuoteContainer, CaseInsensitiveHashMap<CurveSurfaceQuoteContainer> curveSurfaceQuoteContainerRollDownMap) throws java.lang.Exception
      TreasuryBondExplainProcessor Constructor
      Parameters:
      treasuryComponent - The Treasury Component
      marketMeasure - The Market Measure Name
      marketMeasureValue - The Market Measure Value
      t1 - First Date
      t2 - Second Date
      t1CurveSurfaceQuoteContainer - First Market Parameters
      t2CurveSurfaceQuoteContainer - Second Market Parameters
      curveSurfaceQuoteContainerRollDownMap - Map of the Roll Down Market Parameters
      Throws:
      java.lang.Exception - Thrown if the Inputs are Invalid
